raw_consumer_statement:
I received a credit for 2 fraud charges on my XX/XX/XXXX statement for fraud charges XXXX XXXX XXXXXX/XX/XXXX {$930.00} XXXX XXXX XXXXXX/XX/XXXX {$2700.00} The issue is that the 2 fraud claim credits do not reflect off of my owed balance. 
So the paper statement shows that these 2 charges were reversed on the paper statement, but in reality, amex did not take the charges off my statement balance and credit me back for these unauthorized charges.
